title: astragalus scalaris
intro: Astragalus scalaris, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to China and Mongolia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. Astragalus scalaris is believed to offer several health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. It is typically prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
